name: full-review-pipeline
description: Review code for quality, security, performance, and generate documentation

steps.prompt: Review the following code for correctness, design, and maintainability. Output structured findings.
Review the same code for vulnerabilities, OWASP Top 10 risks, and auth issues.
Review the code for performance bottlenecks, N+1 queries, caching opportunities, and bundle size issues.
Synthesize the findings from code review, security review, and performance review into a unified report. Merge related findings, flag conflicts, and prioritize by severity.
